reasoning: The Pittsburgh Pirates came into the 2025 season as an underdog (pre-season win total ~76.5) but have massively underperformed. As of May 11, 2025, their record is 14-28 (last in the NL Central), they recently suffered a severe losing streak (10 losses in 11 games), and they have just fired their manager Derek Shelton. Early May betting markets showed their NL Pennant odds lengthening to 100-to-1, and the Polymarket price was exactly 0.01 on May 1. Given their historically bad start (batting .184 over the first 16 games) and current winning percentage (.333), they are highly unlikely to even make the playoffs, let alone win the NL Pennant. I am submitting 0.02 as it is the minimum allowed probability.
